novelty.rationale: LITE local engineering replication; no novelty claim

feasibility.rationale: The earlier A/B evaluation established the read-only harness; this run adds a model-specific structure pilot

review.rationale: LITE profile; blind scoring is defined in the locked protocol

warnings: One sample per case-variant pair does not estimate stochastic variance.
Cross-model differences are descriptive because reasoning effort differs from the GPT-5.5 parent run.
Only one local blind scorer was used because external scoring of workspace data was prohibited.
